message:
feat(engine): add 255 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Fifth batch of enrichment tests:

- claim_envelope_contract: 39 tests (claim tiers, verdicts, contract
  evaluation, frontier/target/publishable scenarios, downgrades)
- cold_start_aot_governance: 72 tests (startup paths, parity checks,
  rollback triggers, governance verdicts, evidence/receipt hashing)
- component_shape_catalog: 51 tests (prop flow/value kinds, render
  purity classification, hook profiles, shape analysis, catalogs)
- constrained_ambient_benchmark_lane: 38 tests (lane metrics, proof
  attribution, gating decisions, performance regression detection)
- controller_composition_stability_gate: 55 tests (stability claims,
  instability signals, gate evaluation, batch processing, reports)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
